---
title: "Test Page"
subtitle: "Testing all leaflet shortcode inputs and error-handling behaviour"
leaflet:
  # ── Valid maps ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  # Minimal: only center + zoom; height falls back to default (400px)
  t-minimal:
    center: [51.505, -0.09]
    zoom: 13

  # Basic: all three fundamental arguments
  t-basic:
    center: [51.505, -0.09]
    zoom: 13
    height: "380px"

  # Markers: every popup/tooltip combination
  t-markers:
    center: [59.33, 18.07]
    zoom: 11
    height: "380px"
    markers:
      - position: [59.33, 18.07]        # popup + tooltip
        popup: "<b>Stockholm</b><br>Capital city"
        tooltip: "Stockholm"
      - position: [59.35, 18.10]        # tooltip only
        tooltip: "Djurgården (tooltip only)"
      - position: [59.31, 18.05]        # popup only
        popup: "Södermalm (popup only)"
      - position: [59.28, 18.09]        # neither popup nor tooltip

  # Markers loaded from a TSV file via markers-file + separator
  t-markers-tab:
    center: [59.33, 18.07]
    zoom: 12
    height: "360px"
    markers-file: "data/stockholm-markers.tsv"
    markers-separator: "\t"

  # Markers loaded from a CSV file (auto-detected by extension)
  t-markers-csv:
    center: [59.33, 18.07]
    zoom: 12
    height: "360px"
    markers-file: "data/stockholm-markers.csv"

  # Markers loaded from semicolon-separated text file
  t-markers-semi-txt:
    center: [59.33, 18.07]
    zoom: 12
    height: "360px"
    markers-file: "data/stockholm-markers-semicolon.txt"
    markers-separator: ";"

  # Markers loaded from pipe-separated text file
  t-markers-pipe-txt:
    center: [59.33, 18.07]
    zoom: 12
    height: "360px"
    markers-file: "data/stockholm-markers-pipe.txt"
    markers-separator: "|"

  # Icon markers: Bootstrap Icons, icon-color, icon-size, icon-anchor
  t-icons:
    center: [48.86, 2.35]
    zoom: 13
    height: "380px"
    markers:
      - position: [48.8584, 2.2945]
        popup: "<b>Eiffel Tower</b>"
        icon: "bi-geo-alt-fill"
        icon-color: "tomato"
        icon-size: 28
      - position: [48.8606, 2.3376]
        popup: "<b>Louvre Museum</b>"
        icon: "bi-building"
        icon-color: "#4a90d9"
        icon-size: 24
        icon-anchor: [12, 24]           # explicit anchor offset
      - position: [48.853, 2.3499]
        popup: "<b>Notre-Dame</b>"
        icon: "bi-pin-map-fill"
        icon-color: "green"
        icon-size: 26

  # Regression check: default Leaflet markers next to a Bootstrap icon marker
  t-default-vs-bsicon:
    center: [51.505, -0.09]
    zoom: 13
    height: "340px"
    markers:
      - position: [51.505, -0.09]
        popup: "Default Leaflet marker"
        tooltip: "Default marker"
      - position: [51.51, -0.082]
        popup: "Bootstrap Icons marker"
        tooltip: "Bootstrap icon"
        icon: "bi-geo-alt-fill"
        icon-color: "tomato"
        icon-size: 28
      - position: [51.5, -0.1]
        popup: "Second default Leaflet marker"
        tooltip: "Default marker 2"

  # Font Awesome markers for icon-font compatibility testing
  t-fontawesome:
    center: [41.9028, 12.4964]
    zoom: 13
    height: "340px"
    markers:
      - position: [41.9028, 12.4964]
        popup: "<b>Roman Forum</b>"
        tooltip: "Forum"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-landmark"
        icon-color: "#b04a2b"
        icon-size: 26
      - position: [41.89, 12.4922]
        popup: "<b>Colosseum</b>"
        tooltip: "Colosseum"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-torii-gate"
        icon-color: "#5c6f7b"
        icon-size: 24
      - position: [41.8986, 12.4768]
        popup: "<b>Piazza Navona</b>"
        tooltip: "Piazza Navona"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-tree"
        icon-color: "#2f7d32"
        icon-size: 24

  # Custom image icon via URL
  t-image-icon:
    center: [51.5, -0.09]
    zoom: 13
    height: "340px"
    markers:
      - position: [51.5, -0.09]
        popup: "Custom image icon"
        icon:
          url: "https://leafletjs.com/examples/custom-icons/leaf-green.png"
          size: [38, 95]
          anchor: [22, 94]
      - position: [51.505, -0.07]
        popup: "Default blue marker alongside custom icon"

  # Custom tile layer (CartoDB dark_all)
  t-tile-dark:
    center: [40.7128, -74.006]
    zoom: 11
    height: "380px"
    tile:
      url: "https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png"
      attribution: "&copy; <a href='https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright'>OpenStreetMap</a> contributors &copy; CARTO"
      subdomains: "abcd"
      maxZoom: 20
    markers:
      - position: [40.7128, -74.006]
        popup: "<b>New York City</b>"
        icon: "bi-geo-alt-fill"
        icon-color: "#ff6b6b"
        icon-size: 28

  # Custom tile layer (CartoDB Voyager)
  t-tile-voyager:
    center: [35.68, 139.69]
    zoom: 12
    height: "340px"
    tile:
      url: "https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/rastertiles/voyager/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png"
      attribution: "&copy; <a href='https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright'>OpenStreetMap</a> contributors &copy; CARTO"
      subdomains: "abcd"
      maxZoom: 19

  # Passthrough Leaflet L.map() options
  t-passthrough:
    center: [40.7128, -74.006]
    zoom: 14
    height: "340px"
    zoomControl: false
    scrollWheelZoom: false
    dragging: true
    doubleClickZoom: false
    keyboard: false
    minZoom: 10
    maxZoom: 18

  # ── Error-case maps (used to test graceful degradation) ─────────────────────

  # Markers list with intentionally bad entries mixed with valid ones
  t-bad-markers:
    center: [0.0, 0.0]
    zoom: 2
    height: "300px"
    markers:
      - popup: "No position key — silently skipped"
      - position: [51.5, -0.1]
        popup: "Valid marker — should appear"
      - position: "not-a-list"          # scalar string, not [lat, lon]
        popup: "Invalid position type — silently skipped"
      - position: [200.0, 400.0]        # out-of-range coords (Leaflet JS handles)
        popup: "Out-of-range coords — Leaflet handles gracefully"
      - position: [0.0, 0.0]
        popup: "Valid marker at origin"

  # tile sub-key provided as a boolean (not a sub-table) — ignored safely
  t-tile-bool:
    center: [51.505, -0.09]
    zoom: 12
    height: "300px"
    tile: true                          # invalid type: should fall back to default OSM tile

format:
  html:
    code-overflow: wrap
    number-sections: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.2/css/all.min.css">
---

This page exercises every argument and feature of the `leaflet` shortcode extension, including a suite of error cases.
For error cases the extension must **never crash** — it must either render a visible error message or silently skip the bad input and continue rendering.

::: {.callout-note}
All tests are run in the HTML output format.
:::

## YAML-based maps

### Minimal — center + zoom only

Default height (`400px`) is used when `height` is omitted.

```yaml
leaflet:
  t-minimal:
    center: [51.505, -0.09]
    zoom: 13
```

```lua
{{{< leaflet t-minimal >}}}
```

{{< leaflet t-minimal >}}

### Basic — center, zoom, height

```yaml
leaflet:
  t-basic:
    center: [51.505, -0.09]
    zoom: 13
    height: "380px"
```

```lua
{{{< leaflet t-basic >}}}
```

{{< leaflet t-basic >}}

### Markers — all popup/tooltip combinations

Tests four markers:

| Marker | popup | tooltip |
|--------|-------|---------|
| Stockholm | ✓ | ✓ |
| Djurgården | — | ✓ |
| Södermalm | ✓ | — |
| Unnamed point | — | — |

{{< leaflet t-markers >}}

### Markers from TSV (markers-file + separator)

Loads markers from `data/stockholm-markers.tsv` using `lat`/`lon`, `popup`,
`tooltip`, and icon columns.

```yaml
leaflet:
  t-markers-tab:
    center: [59.33, 18.07]
    zoom: 12
    markers-file: "data/stockholm-markers.tsv"
    markers-separator: "\t"
```

{{< leaflet t-markers-tab >}}

### Markers from CSV

Loads markers from `data/stockholm-markers.csv` using the generic
`markers-file` option.

```yaml
leaflet:
  t-markers-csv:
    center: [59.33, 18.07]
    zoom: 12
    markers-file: "data/stockholm-markers.csv"
```

{{< leaflet t-markers-csv >}}

### Markers from semicolon-separated .txt

```yaml
leaflet:
  t-markers-semi-txt:
    center: [59.33, 18.07]
    zoom: 12
    markers-file: "data/stockholm-markers-semicolon.txt"
    markers-separator: ";"
```

{{< leaflet t-markers-semi-txt >}}

### Markers from pipe-separated .txt

```yaml
leaflet:
  t-markers-pipe-txt:
    center: [59.33, 18.07]
    zoom: 12
    markers-file: "data/stockholm-markers-pipe.txt"
    markers-separator: "|"
```

{{< leaflet t-markers-pipe-txt >}}

### Icon markers — Bootstrap Icons

Tests `icon`, `icon-color`, `icon-size`, and `icon-anchor`.

```yaml
---
leaflet:
  t-icons:
    center: [48.86, 2.35]
    zoom: 13
    height: "380px"
    markers:
      - position: [48.8584, 2.2945]
        popup: "<b>Eiffel Tower</b>"
        icon: "bi-geo-alt-fill"
        icon-color: "tomato"
        icon-size: 28
      - position: [48.8606, 2.3376]
        popup: "<b>Louvre Museum</b>"
        icon: "bi-building"
        icon-color: "#4a90d9"
        icon-size: 24
        icon-anchor: [12, 24]           # explicit anchor offset
      - position: [48.853, 2.3499]
        popup: "<b>Notre-Dame</b>"
        icon: "bi-pin-map-fill"
        icon-color: "green"
        icon-size: 26
---

{{{< leaflet t-icons >}}}
```

{{< leaflet t-icons >}}

### Default markers and Bootstrap Icons together

This map exists to catch the packaging bug where default Leaflet markers disappear while Bootstrap icon markers still render. All three markers below must be visible at the same time.

```yaml
---
leaflet:
  t-default-vs-bsicon:
    center: [51.505, -0.09]
    zoom: 13
    height: "340px"
    markers:
      - position: [51.505, -0.09]
        popup: "Default Leaflet marker"
        tooltip: "Default marker"
      - position: [51.51, -0.082]
        popup: "Bootstrap Icons marker"
        tooltip: "Bootstrap icon"
        icon: "bi-geo-alt-fill"
        icon-color: "tomato"
        icon-size: 28
      - position: [51.5, -0.1]
        popup: "Second default Leaflet marker"
        tooltip: "Default marker 2"
---
{{{< leaflet t-default-vs-bsicon >}}}
```

{{< leaflet t-default-vs-bsicon >}}

### FontAwesome markers

This page loads FontAwesome CSS in its HTML header so these icon-font markers can render without requiring extra project setup.

```yaml
leaflet:
  t-fontawesome:
    center: [41.9028, 12.4964]
    zoom: 13
    markers:
      - position: [41.9028, 12.4964]
        icon: "fa-solid fa-landmark"
      - position: [41.89, 12.4922]
        icon: "fa-solid fa-torii-gate"
      - position: [41.8986, 12.4768]
        icon: "fa-solid fa-tree"
```

{{< leaflet t-fontawesome >}}

### Custom image icon

The first marker uses a remote PNG via `icon: {url: ..., size: [...], anchor: [...]}`.

{{< leaflet t-image-icon >}}

### Custom tile layer — CartoDB dark

Tests the `tile` sub-object with `url`, `attribution`, `subdomains`, and `maxZoom`.

{{< leaflet t-tile-dark >}}

### Custom tile layer — CartoDB Voyager

{{< leaflet t-tile-voyager >}}

### Passthrough Leaflet options

Passes `zoomControl`, `scrollWheelZoom`, `dragging`, `doubleClickZoom`,
`keyboard`, `minZoom`, and `maxZoom` directly to `L.map()`.
Scroll-wheel zoom and double-click zoom are disabled; dragging is on.

{{< leaflet t-passthrough >}}

## Inline shortcode maps

### Minimal inline — center + zoom

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[48.86, 2.35]" zoom=14 >}}}
```

{{< leaflet center="[48.86, 2.35]" zoom=14 >}}

### Inline with explicit height

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[48.86, 2.35]" zoom=14 height="320px" >}}}
```

{{< leaflet center="[48.86, 2.35]" zoom=14 height="320px" >}}

### Inline with passthrough options

`scrollWheelZoom` and `zoomControl` passed inline.

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[35.68, 139.69]" zoom=11 height="320px" scrollWheelZoom=false zoomControl=false >}}}
```

{{< leaflet center="[35.68, 139.69]" zoom=11 height="320px" scrollWheelZoom=false zoomControl=false >}}

### Inline with JSON markers

Markers are supplied as a JSON string.

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[59.33, 18.07]" zoom=12 height="320px"
    markers='[{"position":[59.33,18.07],"popup":"<b>Stockholm</b>","tooltip":"Stockholm"},{"position":[59.35,18.10],"popup":"Djurgården"},{"position":[59.31,18.05],"popup":"Södermalm"}]' >}}}
```

{{< leaflet center="[59.33, 18.07]" zoom=12 height="320px" markers='[{"position":[59.33,18.07],"popup":"<b>Stockholm</b>","tooltip":"Stockholm"},{"position":[59.35,18.10],"popup":"Djurgården"},{"position":[59.31,18.05],"popup":"Södermalm"}]' >}}

### Inline with TSV markers (markers-file + separator)

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[59.33, 18.07]" zoom=12 height="320px" markers-file="data/stockholm-markers.tsv" markers-separator="\t" >}}}
```

{{< leaflet center="[59.33, 18.07]" zoom=12 height="320px" markers-file="data/stockholm-markers.tsv" markers-separator="\t" >}}

### Inline with CSV markers

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[59.33, 18.07]" zoom=12 height="320px" markers-file="data/stockholm-markers.csv" >}}}
```

{{< leaflet center="[59.33, 18.07]" zoom=12 height="320px" markers-file="data/stockholm-markers.csv" >}}

### Inline with semicolon-separated .txt markers

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[59.33, 18.07]" zoom=12 height="320px" markers-file="data/stockholm-markers-semicolon.txt" markers-separator=";" >}}}
```

{{< leaflet center="[59.33, 18.07]" zoom=12 height="320px" markers-file="data/stockholm-markers-semicolon.txt" markers-separator=";" >}}

### Multiple inline maps on the same page

Each map must receive a unique HTML `id` and JS variable name.

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[35.68, 139.69]" zoom=10 height="260px" >}}}
{{{< leaflet center="[-33.87, 151.21]" zoom=11 height="260px" >}}}
```

{{< leaflet center="[35.68, 139.69]" zoom=10 height="260px" >}}

{{< leaflet center="[-33.87, 151.21]" zoom=11 height="260px" >}}

### Inline Font Awesome icons

This checks inline JSON markers using Font Awesome classes.

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[41.9028, 12.4964]" zoom=13 height="320px"
  markers='[{"position":[41.9028,12.4964],"popup":"<b>Roman Forum</b>","icon":"fa-solid fa-landmark","icon-color":"#b04a2b","icon-size":26},{"position":[41.89,12.4922],"popup":"<b>Colosseum</b>","icon":"fa-solid fa-torii-gate","icon-color":"#5c6f7b","icon-size":24},{"position":[41.8986,12.4768],"popup":"<b>Piazza Navona</b>","icon":"fa-solid fa-tree","icon-color":"#2f7d32","icon-size":24}]' >}}}
```

{{< leaflet center="[41.9028, 12.4964]" zoom=13 height="320px" markers='[{"position":[41.9028,12.4964],"popup":"<b>Roman Forum</b>","icon":"fa-solid fa-landmark","icon-color":"#b04a2b","icon-size":26},{"position":[41.89,12.4922],"popup":"<b>Colosseum</b>","icon":"fa-solid fa-torii-gate","icon-color":"#5c6f7b","icon-size":24},{"position":[41.8986,12.4768],"popup":"<b>Piazza Navona</b>","icon":"fa-solid fa-tree","icon-color":"#2f7d32","icon-size":24}]' >}}

## Error handling

All cases below **must not crash** Quarto rendering. The extension either emits a
visible error notice or silently skips the offending input.

### No arguments whatsoever

`center` is required; the extension must report this without crashing.

```lua
{{{< leaflet >}}}
```

**Expected:** visible error — `'center' is required`

{{< leaflet >}}

### Named label that does not exist in metadata

```lua
{{{< leaflet no-such-map >}}}
```

**Expected:** visible error — `map 'no-such-map' not found in metadata`

{{< leaflet no-such-map >}}

### Invalid center — no brackets

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="51.505,-0.09" zoom=13 >}}}
```

**Expected:** visible error — `'center' is required`

{{< leaflet center="51.505,-0.09" zoom=13 >}}

### Invalid center — only one coordinate

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[51.505]" zoom=13 >}}}
```

**Expected:** visible error — `'center' is required`

{{< leaflet center="[51.505]" zoom=13 >}}

### Invalid center — non-numeric values

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[abc, xyz]" zoom=13 >}}}
```

**Expected:** visible error — `'center' is required`

{{< leaflet center="[abc, xyz]" zoom=13 >}}

### Invalid center — empty brackets

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[]" zoom=13 >}}}
```

**Expected:** visible error — `'center' is required`

{{< leaflet center="[]" zoom=13 >}}

### Invalid center — too many coordinates

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[51.5, -0.09, 100]" zoom=13 >}}}
```

**Expected:** visible error — `'center' is required` (parser requires exactly 2 values)

{{< leaflet center="[51.5, -0.09, 100]" zoom=13 >}}

### Zoom as non-numeric string

`zoom` is invalid; the extension must fall back to the default zoom of `13`.

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[51.505, -0.09]" zoom="very-high" height="300px" >}}}
```

**Expected:** map renders at default zoom 13

{{< leaflet center="[51.505, -0.09]" zoom="very-high" height="300px" >}}

### Invalid JSON for inline markers

Markers are silently dropped; the map still renders.

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[51.505, -0.09]" zoom=13 height="300px" markers="not-json-at-all" >}}}
```

**Expected:** map renders without markers

{{< leaflet center="[51.505, -0.09]" zoom=13 height="300px" markers="not-json-at-all" >}}

### Inline markers JSON — wrong root type (not an array)

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[51.505, -0.09]" zoom=13 height="300px" markers='{"position":[51.5,-0.1],"popup":"object not array"}' >}}}
```

**Expected:** map renders without markers (JSON object instead of array is ignored)

{{< leaflet center="[51.505, -0.09]" zoom=13 height="300px" markers='{"position":[51.5,-0.1],"popup":"object not array"}' >}}

### Inline marker with missing position in JSON array

The marker without `position` is silently skipped; valid markers are added.

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[51.505, -0.09]" zoom=13 height="300px"
    markers='[{"popup":"no position"},{"position":[51.5,-0.1],"popup":"valid marker"}]' >}}}
```

**Expected:** map renders with one marker (lat 51.5, lon -0.1)

{{< leaflet center="[51.505, -0.09]" zoom=13 height="300px" markers='[{"popup":"no position"},{"position":[51.5,-0.1],"popup":"valid marker"}]' >}}

### YAML map with bad marker entries mixed with valid ones

Uses the `t-bad-markers` YAML map (defined in frontmatter) which includes:

- A marker with no `position` key → skipped
- A marker with `position: "not-a-list"` → skipped
- Two valid markers → rendered

**Expected:** map renders with 3 visible markers (valid + out-of-range as Leaflet handles it)

{{< leaflet t-bad-markers >}}

### YAML `tile` given as a boolean, not a sub-table

Uses the `t-tile-bool` YAML map where `tile: true` instead of a sub-object.

**Expected:** map renders using the default OpenStreetMap tile layer

{{< leaflet t-tile-bool >}}

### Unknown / extra kwargs (passthrough)

Unrecognised kwargs are forwarded to `L.map()` as options. Leaflet ignores
unrecognised options, so no error should occur.

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[51.505, -0.09]" zoom=13 height="280px" unknownOption="foo" anotherFake=42 >}}}
```

**Expected:** map renders normally (unknown options are ignored by Leaflet)

{{< leaflet center="[51.505, -0.09]" zoom=13 height="280px" unknownOption="foo" anotherFake=42 >}}

### Wrong separator for markers-file

The file exists, but `markers-separator` is intentionally wrong.
Rows should fail to parse into valid marker coordinates, while the map itself
still renders without crashing.

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[59.33, 18.07]" zoom=12 height="300px" markers-file="data/stockholm-markers-semicolon.txt" markers-separator="," >}}}
```

**Expected:** map renders, but no markers are added.

{{< leaflet center="[59.33, 18.07]" zoom=12 height="300px" markers-file="data/stockholm-markers-semicolon.txt" markers-separator="," >}}

### Multiple positional args (not a valid named-label call)

When more than one positional arg is given, the shortcode falls through to
kwargs mode.  With no `center` kwarg the extension must report the missing
argument.

```lua
{{{< leaflet t-basic extra-arg >}}}
```

**Expected:** visible error — `'center' is required`

{{< leaflet t-basic extra-arg >}}

### Named label call with extra kwargs (kwargs win)

When both a positional label *and* kwargs are present, the code switches to
kwargs mode and the label is ignored. With no `center` kwarg the shortcode
reports the error.

```lua
{{{< leaflet t-basic zoom=13 >}}}
```

**Expected:** visible error — `'center' is required` (label is ignored; `center` kwarg is absent)

{{< leaflet t-basic zoom=13 >}}
